rankings.title: Fe-S Cluster Cu-Fe Replacement Series
rankings.evolution_task: Strengthen — add explicit Ksp calculation and Fe2+ release stoichiometry as second prediction

rankings.title: FDX1 Redox Potential Tuned to Vent Cu2+/Cu+ Boundary
rankings.evolution_task: Fix confound — design Eh-manipulation protocol separating Eh from respiration

rankings.title: H2S-CuS Nanoparticle Feed-Forward Loop
rankings.evolution_task: Mechanistic surgery — remove nanoparticle nucleation step; re-anchor on H2S-Cu coordination and biphasic kinetics

rankings.title: CuS-H2O2 Fenton-Analog Radical Cycle
rankings.evolution_task: Fix H2O2 paradox — add exogenous H2O2 arm or identify alternative matrix ROS source

adaptive_cycle_check.decision: proceed_to_evolution — evolution recommended despite skip-eligibility because H1.3 and H1.6 have mechanistic problems addressable by evolution before Quality Gate

diversity_check: PASS — top 3 span distinct mechanism types (thermodynamic displacement, Eh-boundary alignment, nanoparticle kinetics), different experimental platforms, and different bridge logic. One convergent pair exists in top 5 (H1.3 and H1.6 share CuS nanoparticle bridge mechanism) but 3-pair threshold not reached. No re-ranking adjustment needed.
elo_note: Rankings identical across all 6 positions. Critic's post-critique ordering differed at positions 4-6 (Critic: H1.1 > H1.7 > H1.6). Both Elo and linear composite promote H1.6 over H1.7 and H1.1 due to 20% Testability weight penalizing inconclusive tests (H1.1) and multi-year timelines (H1.7).

exclusion_rationale.H1.7: Groundedness 4, Testability 4, Generator confidence 3/10. 2-3 year minimum timeline. Not worth evolution cycle.
exclusion_rationale.H1.1: Misattributed foundational citation (log K value). Analogical-only bridge. Test underdetermines hypothesis regardless of outcome.
